Technology engineering and integration from Colombia

Advanced technology to protect, connect and anticipate.

Eagle Commercial integrates engineering and advanced technology solutions for defense, security, critical infrastructure and organizations operating where reliability is non-negotiable.

Explore our capabilities Talk to a specialist
  • Technology selected around the mission
  • Local integration, deployment and support
  • Technical information under controlled access
01Detection
02Connectivity
03Decision
Explore

Solutions designed around the mission, not around a catalogue.

  • Engineering
  • Integration
  • Deployment
  • Support

Company

We integrate technology for critical operations.

Eagle Commercial is a Colombian company focused on identifying, integrating and implementing technology solutions for public and private organizations. We combine engineering, local knowledge, access to specialized suppliers and technical support to turn complex needs into dependable capabilities.

Our work spans initial assessment, architecture design, logistics, installation, training and lifecycle support.

Explore capabilities

Remote intervention

T-Series ground robotic systems

UGV platforms for reconnaissance, technical inspection, remote manipulation and intervention in scenarios where reducing human exposure is a priority.

  • Precision manipulation
  • Modular sensors and payloads
  • Remote operation in complex environments
Learn more
Persistent coverage

Ultra-endurance aerial systems

Long-range electric aircraft for observation, technical surveillance and extended-duration missions with a low logistics footprint and agile deployment.

  • Rapid deployment
  • Quiet operation
  • Large-area coverage
Learn more
RF operations

Mission cellular architectures

Portable and vehicle-based systems for analysis, monitoring and mission cellular capabilities that integrate into tactical deployments, operations centers or technical labs.

  • Modular architecture
  • Operational scalability
  • Mobile or fixed integration
Learn more
Emitter location

Tactical and fixed radiogoniometry

Solutions for directional detection, geolocation and understanding of the electromagnetic environment in deployable, mobile or permanent configurations.

  • Tactical and perimeter coverage
  • Operational visualization
  • Fixed or deployable architectures
Learn more
Short-range airspace protection

Perimeter C-UAS detection

Sensors and early warning architectures to detect, track and support the assessment of drone-related risks around critical infrastructure, perimeters and strategic events.

  • 24/7 coverage
  • Control center integration
  • Layered scalability
Learn more
On-site autonomy

Portable energy and operational continuity

Power and storage systems to support communications, sensors, workstations and technical deployments in remote sites or contingency scenarios.

  • Portable configurations
  • Backup for critical loads
  • Mission-based scalability
Learn more

L3Harris

Mission technologies, robotic platforms and remote intervention capabilities.

Octasic

Advanced RF solutions, cellular architectures and modular payloads.

Kraus Hamdani Aerospace

Long-range electric aerial platforms with a very low logistics footprint.

Complementary technologies

Continuous evaluation of international solutions to expand the portfolio for specialized projects.

Capabilities

Technology articulated as a system.

We present general capabilities rather than public product catalogues. Configuration, availability and scope are defined after understanding the requirement and validating the applicable framework.

01

Intelligence and situational awareness

Capabilities designed to integrate information from multiple sources and turn it into actionable knowledge within the applicable legal framework.

Explore capability
02

Critical communications

Voice, data and connectivity architectures for fixed, mobile or deployable operations that require dependable coordination in demanding conditions.

Explore capability
03

Signal monitoring and analysis

Technologies to observe, characterize and understand the electromagnetic environment according to each project’s authorization, scope and requirements.

Explore capability
05

Protection against uncrewed systems

Scalable architectures to detect, track, assess and manage risks associated with uncrewed aerial platforms in authorized environments.

Explore capability
06

Robotic and autonomous platforms

Aerial and ground systems for inspection, observation, transport or remote intervention when reducing human exposure is a priority.

Explore capability
12

Custom engineering

Design and integration of solutions that combine technologies, platforms, services and support around a specific operational need.

Explore capability
View all capabilities

Sectors

Technology beyond a single environment.

Our capabilities can adapt to public and private organizations that need to protect assets, maintain communications, monitor operations or act in complex scenarios.

Defense and security

Technology capabilities for coordination, situational awareness, facility protection and support to authorized operations.

Government and justice

Solutions for organizations managing information, investigations, communications and institutional continuity.

Critical infrastructure

Integration of monitoring, communications, energy and protection for assets whose continuity is essential.

Energy and telecommunications

Operational visibility, inspection, connectivity and backup for distributed networks and remote sites.

View all sectors

Methodology

From need to operational capability.

We do more than supply equipment. We design a coherent solution, support implementation and help preserve its value over time.

  1. 01

    Requirement discovery

    We define the expected outcome, environment, constraints and stakeholders.

  2. 02

    Technical and operational analysis

    We assess risks, dependencies, existing infrastructure and implementation conditions.

  3. 03

    Architecture design

    We select components and services to build a coherent, scalable solution.

  4. 04

    Integration and configuration

    We align interfaces, workflows, policies and parameters with the approved project.

  5. 05

    Deployment and training

    We implement, test and transfer knowledge to operators and technical staff.

  6. 06

    Support and evolution

    We support lifecycle continuity, warranties and the evolution of the capability.

Differentiators

An integrated capability, supported locally.

Local engineering

Knowledge of the Colombian environment to turn complex needs into viable implementations.

Multi-vendor integration

Technology selection based on the architecture rather than dependence on a single catalogue.

International access

Relationships with specialized suppliers and continuous assessment of emerging capabilities.

Logistics management

Support for import, storage, customs clearance and delivery of specialized technology.

Knowledge transfer

Preparation of operators, administrators and technicians for responsible, sustainable adoption.

Lifecycle support

Support, maintenance, warranties and upgrades that preserve capability value over time.

Authorized access only

Confidentiality

Strategic technology requires discretion.

Part of our portfolio and projects is subject to confidentiality restrictions. Detailed technical information is shared only with authorized organizations and users after the scope of the requirement has been validated.

Request informationContact a specialist

Eagle Group

A structure prepared for complete projects.

The Eagle ecosystem connects commercial, technical, logistics, storage and customs capabilities to support projects from planning through delivery and support.
